title: Metrica
description: Mod that adds new calculation tools and toys
body:
Metrica is a small mod that has optional compatibility with different mods, it was created to add more calculation tools and toys


<details>
<summary>What mod currently has to offer</summary>

### Pocket Watch

Displays current world time using 24 hour format. Displays data both visually (renderer) and via text (inside tooltip)



### Stopwatch

On use will start counting every tick until used again. Time that passes will be displayed in tooltip as ticks, and minutes + seconds



### Dice

Multiple dice that can be used to output random number with maximum of each displayed in name. Every toss will be broadcasted in chat for all players



### Thermometer

This item can be used to display temperature, and has 2 version (Cold Sweat compatible and Tough as Nails compatible). They will display temperature data using custom renderer (visually) and in tooltip. If no temperature mod is loaded thermometers won't be registered, and won't appear in game

### Oscilloscope

This item currently allows you to display functions with different parameters

### Tuning Fork

Plays blocks note sound, can be attuned to play lower or higher pitch

### Playing Cards

Each deck is unique since it uses custom shaders for rendering. Can be used to play different games

</details>
